changes: Reduced home hero and title scale to prevent overflow and invasive appearance.
Removed the invisible decorative panel from the home banner.
Repositioned admin quick dock as a compact bottom-right control.
Removed visible separator blur strips and replaced them with imperceptible surface continuity.
Redesigned Resources hero and cards with waves, circles and executive motion.
Redesigned News hero, summary and cards with waves, air movement and controlled depth.
Moved Ideas balloons away from the New Idea button and preserved button stacking.
Added page-resources and page-vigencias body classes.
